titleStmt.title: SII 20.179: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 179. (B.K. No. 66 of 1937-38.) SĀLOṬGI, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up against the front wall of the Chāvaḍi in Holagēri.

summary.p: In this damaged and worn out record, the date-portion is lost.

The inscription records a gift of the village Māvuliganūr for the benefit of the temple of Bhōgēśvara at Pauṭhage by Baṁdarasa of the Jīmutavāhana family who was administering Pauṭhage as a subordinate of the minister Māyidēva. The gift was entrusted to Amarēśvaradēva, the āchārya of the temple. Mentions Baṁdarasa's subordinate tantrapāḷa Boppaṇa.
The record gives a genealogical account of Baṁdarasa and a description of the place Pauṭhage.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatpratāpacakravartti yādavanārāyaṇa dēvara pratāpameṁtaṁdaḍe . baḷava
gūrjjarāvanipāḷakarīṁdrasiṁha kaḷacuryyakuḷārṇnava bāḍavāgni pāṁcāḷamalla
nenutaṁ bhillamāvanipāḷana bāhāvidrumamanorppī śa guṁ niraṁtaraṁ .
yādava neṁdaṁdu yādavanārāyaṇa yādavakulāṁbhōjāta rmāttagaṁḍaneṁdavanīcakraṁ
peṁpiniṁ stutiyikuṁ śrīyādavāṁbōdhikairavamitra māṁdhātanaṁ . tatpādapadmōpajī
caritaṁ nirduritaṁ manaṁ śivapadaikadhyānasaṁsthānavaṇmaribraṁdakṣayakāri cāruva danaṁ varamūrtti surakāṁtānaya
dayōtsavanenalsāmānyanē sujanābharaṇaṁ yādavamaṁtri vipratiḷakaṁ śrī māyidēvaṁ diṭaṁ . kēvaṇadiṁde māṇi
kyadeṁtesedarppudu marttyasēneyō rā diṁdaveṁtesedu tōṟuvudaṁtire kīrttikāṁtanī śrīmadanargghyabhillamanṛpāḷana
rājyadadoṁdu pe(ṁ)rmme niḥkēvaladiṁdavoppuvudamātyaśikhāmaṇi māyidēvaniṁ . tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁ
camahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ nereyoḍe gaṁḍanadaṭaṁ dhuradoḷśanivārasiddhi kopaṇapurēśaṁ varaśiḷahāranarēṁ
draṁ dhareyoḷu jīmūtavāhanānvayajātaṁ . janapati maṁneyavallabha ghanaśauryyadineseva raghujanenipaṁ kāttyāyanī
dēvīvaralabdhaṁ vinutaṁ vibhavāmarēṁdra baṁṭara bāvaṁ . kanakagaruḍadhvaja kkenasuṁ bhayalōbhadurllabhaṁ śauryadoḷudghanadī
tanūjanenipaṁ vinutaṁ jagadoḷage satyarāthēyanripaṁ . parabaḷasādhakaṁ bhōgēśvara pādhārādhakaṁ nṛpāḷalalā
varakriṣṇe pāṁjada paryyaṁtaṁ baṁdanripati . nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanma
hāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ baṁdarasananvayameṁteṁdaḍe . mēruvina teṁkadeseyoḷ bhārata sukṣētravalli kuṁtaḷaviśayaṁ sā
kuṁtaḷabhūmiyoḷārayvaḍe tarddavāḍiviśayaṁ celuvaṁ . Ā viśayada bhūmīśa rbhūvaryyarssakaḷanṛpati
cūḍāmaṇigaḷkāvidiṟiva guṇaṁ nīṁ kēvaladiṁ sahajavī śiḷārānvayadoḷu . Ā vaṁśajanavanīśaṁ śrī vijayapuranivā
sa dhanasaṁgrahanaṁtā vasudhīśana kuladoḷu cāvuṁḍanripāḷanesedananupamaśauryyaṁ . Avanīśāgraṇi bhūmipāḷa
tiḷakaṁ cāvuṁḍabhūpāḷanoppuva cittapriya dhairyadiṁ dhare kaḷāprāgalbhyadiṁ vāṇi rāghavanarddhāṁgi pati
hitācaraṇeyiṁ tāneṁdu baṁṇnipudutsavadiṁ sōvaladēviyaṁ budhajanaṁ saubhāgya saṁpaṁneyaṁ . Avari
rvvargge nṛpāḷabhāḷatiḷakarvvīrātisainyāṁtakarkkavivriṁdastutarapratarkyamahimarbhbhū lōkakaḻpadrumarbhbhavapādāṁ
bujabhriṁga ḷayaśassauṁdaryyapuḻpāstrarutsavadiṁ puṭṭidaraṁdu baṁdarasanuṁ śrīgōvaṇōrbbīśa
nuṁ . Āṁtaḍe koṁdaneṁde bage śatrunikāyamanartthi baṁdu kayyāṁtaḍe koṭṭaneṁde bage bēḷpudanaṁji śaraṇevaṁdara
ṁtiye kādaneṁde bage vīrada cāgada kāva permme toṇeyeṁdu baṁṇnipudu dhāriṇi gōvaṇamaṇḍaḷēśanaṁ .
Enipā gōvaṇabhūmipāḷana viśāḷōrasthaḷasthāyi mēdinithairyyōṁnatiyiṁ pati bratade sītādēvi saubhāgyadiṁ
nitārddhāṁgane gauri lakṣmiyodaviṁ śrī kāṁteyiṁ sajjaneyaṁ kāmala dēviyaṁ stutiyikuṁ vidvajjanaṁ saṁtataṁ .
Enipā kāmaladēvigaṁ nṛpālalāmaṁ gōvaṇōrbbīśvaraṁganurūpaṁ mige puṭṭidaṁ parahitabyāpāra jīmūtavā
hanavaṁśaṁ nereyoḍe gaṁḍanadaṭaṁ cāvuṁḍabhūpāḷanātana taṁmaṁ nṛpamēru bhūpatiḷakaṁ śrī baṁdabhūpāḷakaṁ .
© baṁdōrbbīśvara yaṁ ri�śirabrātaṁgaḷaṁ poyye bhōreṁdā nadīpravāhadoḷe bīḷalsiddhamugdhāṁganā
saṁdōhaṁ sarasījavende tiṟuyalsārdeyde bīratvadiṁ nindirddarnnijadoḷnirīkṣipa surarggaṁ hāsyavappannegaṁ .
pratipakṣakṣitipāḷakakṣayakaraṁ prōccaṇḍadōrddaṇḍamaṇḍitakaukṣēyakavirda vidviśanṛpa prāṇaprayāṇapratiṣṭhita
mauhūrttikanuṁnatikke śaraṇāyātakṣamāpāḷakapratatīśakṣaṇameṁdaḍārppaḍiye pēḷ śrī baṁdabhūpāḷanoḷu . ha
jaḷamavandira pandale raktapaṁkajaṁ sogayipa ḷiśapharaṁ karuvāḷi mriṇāḷavāge diṭṭiganēka
voḍe gaṁḍa gelda mahāhavāṁgaṇa� naguvavolirddudeyde kamaḷākaramaṁ diṭadiṁ vicitramō . ghanabhuja
pa nāṭyaśāle bhūvinutava bhūlatāṁgige mukhāṁbujavīkege citraśāle māntana nidhi rājyalakṣmi
vōlagaśāleyene baṁdabhūpana teṟadinde baṇnipa manaṁgaḷa nāvanō . Āṟiyoḷsōlamaneṁduṁ baṟumiṟu
page baṁdanṛpati ninna taḷadoḷeṟagidaranollaḷo pāyvaḷeginadu citraṁ . tatpādapadmōpajīvi .
© manegalla monegallaṁgaḷina nāyakarbhbhāvisalganeyoḷu kaḻpakujātadante kuḍaluṁ māṟāntaraṁ kōpadiṁ moneyo
ḷvēḷu kritāntanante kolaluṁ śrī baṁdigakṣōṇipāḷana cittapriya taṁtrapāḷaneni sirppīmāceyaṁ sālanē . Uḍu
patiyirddiruḷdinapanirdda nabhaṁ hariyirdda vārddhiyaṁ mṛḍanogedirdda tāragiri kaḻpakujāvaḷiyirdda nandanaṁ kaḍugali baṁ
dabhūbhujana naccina meccina taṁtrapāḷanirddeḍeyaṁ pāvanaṁ śubhada vūrjitavudbhava muttarōttaraṁ . Aḷadittaṁ bali bhānujātaneṇi
sittaṁ tūkadindittantaḷipindaṁ śibiyeṁdivaṁ paḷidu taṁnaṁ bēḷpuduṁ bēḷpavarggaḷeyaṁ lekkiganoludu tūgananivāryyaṁ koṭṭapaṁ nōḍadā
gaḷanartthārtthige kūrtu boppaṇacamūpaṁgārssamaṁ dānigaḷu . nereyoḍe gaṇḍanī bandarasaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadi(nō)
(dadi)nolaviṁ piriduṁ rājyaṁ māḍuva puravī pauṭhageya celuvanolaviṁ pogaḷveṁ . Aḷakāpuravamarāvati viḷasadbhōgā
vatipuraṁ samanalleṁdiḷeyellaṁ baṇnippudu pauṭhageya celuvanēnaṁ pogaḷveṁ . śāḷivanāḷiyiṁ śukapikāvaḷiyiṁ ja
ḷajātaśaṁḍadiṁ māḷati molle malliyadirgunteya pe(ṁ)rmmaḷeyalli matta bhṛṁgāḷiya tāramaṁdramadhurasvanadiṁ navapūgacū
ta kittīḷeya nandanāpratatiyiṁ sale pauṭhageyoppi tōṟuguṁ . Aṟuvatteṁṭuṁ tīrtthada neṟe kēḷu pauṭhageya lēsenuttādaradiṁ
kaṟekaṁṭhaṁ bhōgēśaṁ paṟenosala nelasi nindanatyādaradiṁ . Ā dēvarggācāryarvvēdā gama sōmaśaṁbhu lākuḷasiddhāntādi
sakaḷāgamajarmmēdinīsaṁstutyanenipa muniyamarēśaṁ . smaranadaṭarggitakkaḷidu deydeseviṁdriyavōḍi hōdavā
garavenisirppamēḷu basanaṁ desegeṭṭuvu tāmasaṁ rajaṁ saradhiyinatta dāṁṭidavenalka marēśvaradēva niṁnoḷā
rssari dore pāṭi pāsaṭi munīśvararī dharaṇītaḷāgradoḷu . Enipamarēśvara dēvarmmunipuṁgavaravara kālanatyāda
radiṁ mananosedu karcci māvuliganūradhikāri maṁne viṁdaṁ . sale khaṁḍasphuṭatakke khaṇḍikakke jīrṇōddhāramaṁ mā
laviṁ caitrapavitra raṁgādi bhōgakke sū traṁgaḷa māḷpudakke munigaḷācchādanaṁ
ḷpudakoyda māvuliganūraṁ dhāreyaṁ māḍidaru . śrīmatpratāpacakra vartti bhillamadēvarasaru
vīḍinōḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyu śrī sakavatsaraṁ nabhasaśāṁka
savāmātithyadalu vāsaraṁ
dharaṇīśāgraṇi The continuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 20.179 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
